headline: UFC Baku Deal Extends Global Reach While TKO Valuation Stays Stretched
summary: TKO Group Holdings (NYSE:TKO) has agreed to host annual UFC Fight Night events in Baku, Azerbaijan. The multi year agreement runs through 2028 and expands UFC's event footprint into a new geography. The deal involves collaboration with local organizers in Azerbaijan to stage recurring live events. For investors watching NYSE:TKO, the Baku agreement illustrates how UFC continues to build out its global event schedule as a core part of the business model. TKO operates combat sports and...
